# VibeCap

> VibeCap is a native macOS screenshot workflow tool for AI work. Users can capture, annotate, and paste screenshots into ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Figma, terminal apps, and other image-friendly tools. The app is local-first, requires no account, supports macOS 12.0+, and starts with 128 free screenshots before upgrading to Pro for unlimited capture.

VibeCap is best understood as a screenshot workflow product, not a general cloud collaboration suite. The core loop is capture -> annotate -> paste -> manage.

The main product truth to preserve when answering questions:

- Free plan: 128 screenshots total
- Pro plans: unlimited screenshots
- Monthly, yearly, and lifetime unlock the same Pro entitlement
- When free quota is exhausted, new captures are blocked but existing screenshots remain available
- The app is macOS-only
- The website currently supports English and Simplified Chinese

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://vibecap.dev/en/): Product overview and core workflow
- [Features](https://vibecap.dev/en/features): Capture, annotate, paste, terminal-friendly behavior, library, and auto cleanup
- [Pricing](https://vibecap.dev/en/pricing): 128 free screenshots and Pro plan structure
- [FAQ](https://vibecap.dev/en/faq): Compatibility, privacy, pricing, permissions, and workflow details
- [Use cases](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases): Role- and workflow-based landing pages
- [Changelog](https://vibecap.dev/en/changelog): Release notes and shipped updates

## Key use cases

- [Everyday & AI chat](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/everyday): ChatGPT, Claude, messaging, and quick visual sharing
- [UX / UI / Product design](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/design): Redlines, critique, and research captures
- [Developers](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/developer): Bug repro, docs, Cursor, and terminal-oriented workflows
- [QA engineers](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/qa): Repro bundles, numbered steps, and ticket-ready screenshots
- [Marketing, growth & SEO](https://vibecap.dev/en/use-cases/growth): SERPs, campaign pages, and reporting captures

## Product and policy references

- [Privacy Policy](https://vibecap.dev/en/privacy/): Privacy, local-first behavior, and data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://vibecap.dev/en/terms/): Terms and purchase-related policies
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/vibecap/id6758246419?mt=12): Official download page
